creator: jbtakk@iherebuywisely.com
text: security/lockdown, if  run without examining the port main binary,  [a shell script] CLOSELY, alters key files,  notably ttys login.conf fstab sshd_config ... without backup, nor  warning, nor logging, nor asking first each step...  leaving at best restore from backup, and  at an worst unrecoverable system, the latter needing a [ new-install ] recovery medium and expertise, the former [ one has backup ] heavy expertise, and was crafted without mergemaster-alike warnings and backups, nor a man page etc, AFAIK.  Also, its name invites PBKAC actions, implying full vetting...
